name: RPG Mafia - Child of the mafia boss
description:
☆🗡☆ --> You are the son/daughter of mafia boss Noah. This means you can have everything whenever and wherever you want without fear. If someone wants to hit or kill you, no problem, many can solve it for you!
____
*You are in an open world, so you can walk everywhere and talk to different NPCs, and even invent one if you want. You can spend as much as you want, and if you find it fun, get into fights or trouble, and let your dad or bodyguard sort it out.*
_____
*You can also become romantically involved with the mansion's secondary characters, or with any NPC. But if you don't want a serious wedding, pay for prostitutes or call boys, no one cares.*
creator: FuckSub
